text: Assistant: Confirmed — the fixed `tenex-edge launch` window now renders identically to the direct baseline (orange logo, orange banner, yellow warning) and the status line shows `claude@isolated-test-mac project project [idle]` instead of the red `@te_session not set` error. Let me clean up the full-screen captures that inadvertently included your other windows. [...] **Validation:** built the fix, ran it through an isolated daemon + local NIP-29 relay (`croissant`), and had a Haiku agent drive real Terminal.app screenshots via `screencapture`. I reviewed the images myself: the fixed `tenex-edge launch claude` window renders identically to a direct `claude` launch (colored robot logo, orange banner, yellow warning) and its status line reads `claude@isolated-test-mac project project [idle]` instead of the red error. `cargo fmt`, `clippy`, and all 382 lib tests are clean.
